evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of auto-deleting after 24 hours.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that the system auto-deletes temporary booking links 24 hours after the scheduled meeting. However, the evidence provided does not include any direct confirmation of this functionality, as it only describes the creation of temporary links without demonstrating their expiration. The linked use case suggests the intended behavior, but lacks concrete evidence to confirm that the auto-deletion feature is implemented and functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence confirming the expiration of the temporary booking page after the meeting.
